verses:
ahaṅkāra, abhimāna, asatsaṅga, asajjñāna,
chāḍi’ bhaja gurupāda⋅padma
kara ātmanivedana, deha⋅geha⋅parijana,
guruvākya parama mahattva

śrī⋅kṛṣṇacaitanyadeva, niravadhi tā̐re seva,
prema⋅kalpataru⋅varadātā
śrī⋅vraja⋅rājanandana, rādhikā jīvanadhana,
aparūpa ei saba kathā

navadvīpe avatari’, rādhābhāva aṅgīkari,
tā̐ra kānti aṅgera bhūṣaṇa
tina vāñchā abhilāṣi’, śacīgarbhe parakāśi’,
saṅge lañā pāriṣadagaṇa

gaura⋅hari avatari’, premera bādara kari’,
sādhilā manera tina kāja
rādhikāra prāṇapati, kibā bhāve kā̐de niti,
ihā bujhe bhakata⋅samāja

gopane sādhile siddhi, sādhana⋅navadhā bhakti,
prārthanā kariba dainya sadā
kari’ hari saŋkīrtana, sadāi vibhola mana,
iṣṭalābha vinu saba bādhā

saṁsāra⋅vāṭoyāre, kāma phā̐se bā̐dhi’ māre,
phukāri kahaye haridāsa
karaha bhakata saṅga, premakathā⋅rasaraṅga,
tabe habe vipada vināśa

strī⋅putra⋅bāndhava jata, mari’ jābe śata śata,
āpanāke hoo sāvadhāna
muñi se viṣaye hata, nā bhajinu haripada,
mora āra nāhi paritrāṇa

rāmacandra kavirāja, sei saṅge mora kāja,
tā̐ra saṅga vinu saba śūnya
jadi haya janma punaḥ, tā̐ra saṅga laya jena,
tabe haya narottama dhanya

āpana bhajana kathā, nā kahiba jathā tathā,
ihāte hoio sāvadhāna
nā kariha keha roṣa, nā loiha mora doṣa,
praṇamaha bhaktera caraṇa
en_translation:
Abandoning ego, false pride, bad association, and ignorance, worship the lotus feet of your spiritual master. Perform self-surrender with your body, home, and relatives, for the words of the guru are of supreme importance.

Constantly serve Śrī Kṛṣṇa Caitanya, the bestower of the wish-fulfilling tree of divine love. The son of the King of Vraja is Rādhā's treasure of life—all these topics are wonderful.

Appearing in Navadvīpa and accepting the mood of Rādhā, Her luster became the adornment of His body. Desiring to fulfill three wishes, He manifested in the womb of Mother Śacī, taking along His associates.

Gaura⋅hari descended, creating a flood of divine love, and accomplished the three works of His heart. In what mood the beloved of Rādhā constantly cries—only the society of devotees understands this.

If perfection is attained secretly through the nine processes of devotional service, I will always pray with humility. By performing the congregational chanting of the Holy Name with a mind always absorbed, all obstacles are removed for the desired attainment.

In the marketplace of the material world, lust binds and kills with its noose. A servant of the Lord loudly proclaims: "Seek the association of devotees and engage in the joyful pastimes of loving discussions; then all dangers will be destroyed."

Wife, sons, and all relatives—hundreds and hundreds will die. Be careful of yourself! I am ruined by these material affairs; I did not worship the lotus feet of the Lord. For me, there is no more deliverance.

My purpose lies in the association of Rāmacandra Kavirāja. Without his association, everything is void. If I am reborn, may I attain his association; then Narottama will be blessed.

I will not speak of the topics of my devotional service indiscriminately here and there; be careful in this regard. Let no one be angry, and do not take my fault. Offer obeisances to the feet of the devotees.
